mapper.sql: select m.meeting_id, m.meeting_title, m.room_id, r.room_name, m.organizer_id, m.organizer_name, m.start_time, m.end_time, m.meeting_status, case m.meeting_status when 'draft' then '草稿' when 'scheduled' then '已安排' when 'finished' then '已结束' else m.meeting_status end as meeting_status_label, m.summary_content, m.create_by, m.create_time, m.update_by, m.update_time from oa_meeting m left join oa_meeting_room r on m.room_id = r.room_id
mapper.select:
and (m.organizer_id = #{userId} or m.create_by = 'admin')
and m.meeting_title like concat('%', #{meetingTitle}, '%')
and m.meeting_status = #{meetingStatus}
order by case m.meeting_status when 'scheduled' then 1 when 'draft' then 2 when 'finished' then 3 else 9 end, m.start_time asc, m.meeting_id desc
mapper.update: update oa_meeting set meeting_status = 'finished', update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where meeting_id = #{meetingId} and organizer_id = #{userId} and meeting_status != 'finished'
mapper.select: select room_id, room_name, location, capacity, equipment, status from oa_meeting_room where status = '0' order by room_id asc
